title: Abyssal Chocolate
description: A Fully client-side modpack designed for use with the Abyss Server! Can be used with other servers at user descretion
body:
This modpack is designed for AbyssMC A modded server that doesnt need a modpack, 

So why would you make one? 

This modpack has many features I and other members of our communtiy want in minecraft for the client. Things we found usefull ro jsut wanted.

- More hud information

- Better f3 menu

- Shader support

- generally better performance.

- Built in tools that are used for Developing abyss, so players can even develop or build with the tools on the server in singleplayer.
